ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or job title of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Physical location of the employee */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Employee classification (full-time, part-time, contractor) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Employment status (active, terminated) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the department */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Physical location of the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payroll_records" (
  "payroll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payroll record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee this record is associated with */,
  "total_earnings" REAL /* Total earnings for the pay period */,
  "employee_taxes" REAL /* Total taxes withheld from the employee's earnings */,
  "employer_taxes" REAL /* Total taxes contributed by the employer */,
  "net_pay" REAL /* Net pay after all deductions */,
  "pay_period_start" TEXT /* Start date of the pay period */,
  "pay_period_end" TEXT /* End date of the pay period */,
  "overtime_hours" REAL /* Overtime hours worked */,
  "overtime_pay" REAL /* Pay for overtime hours */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Bonus amount */,
  "reimbursements" REAL /* Reimbursement amount */,
  "tax_jurisdiction" TEXT /* Tax jurisdiction for the payroll record */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the payroll is processed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payroll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payroll_records_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_brackets" (
  "bracket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax bracket */,
  "income_range_start" REAL /* Starting income for the bracket */,
  "income_range_end" REAL /* Ending income for the bracket */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applicable to this bracket */,
  "tax_jurisdiction" TEXT /* Tax jurisdiction for the tax bracket */,
  "filing_status" TEXT /* Filing status (single, married) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bracket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee this benefit is associated with */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., Health Insurance, Retirement Plan) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount deducted for this benefit */,
  "deduction_type" TEXT /* Type of deduction (e.g., pre-tax, post-tax) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the benefit became effective */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the benefit was terminated */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., HR, Manager) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with this role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login purposes */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
